creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This can't possibly work unless you use a browser compiled on 6.x.  The 
browser plugin is a shared library and a 7.x application can't be expected 
to load a 6.x shared library and have things work. 

Only solution available is to not install the browser plugin on 7.x.  I'll 
try and get to that before 7.0 is released.
